content: MinecraftThroughTime (smol-kitten, C#/.NET8 CLI, cloned /home/claude): audit 2026-07-11 fixed via PR#15 — path traversal in CDL.cs URL->cache-path (now CachePath() strips ../rooted + confines to cacheDir), Log4J fix for 1.7-1.11.2 was a silent no-op (arg log4j2_17-111.xml vs downloaded log4j2_7-112.xml, now matched), off-by-one crash Entries[index+1] on last profile entry (both override paths), non-http(s) URL reject. FOLLOW-UPS still open: verify jar downloads vs Mojang manifest SHA1 (GetSha1 unused), widen Log4J version coverage to point releases (1.14.4/1.15.2/etc), add test project. No local dotnet — rely on CI dotnet.yml.
